name: Entra Sign-In Risk Explainer
description: Translates Entra ID Protection risk events into plain-English explanations. Ask me about risky sign-ins, what triggered a risk detection, or how to triage a flagged user.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Why was john.smith@contoso.com flagged as high risk today?
A user got an MFA prompt they didn't expect — what should I do?
